title: Follow-ups
description: A recheck or action reminder the clinic/interpreter or coaching/coach proposes off an abnormal result or a goal — turning a one-time flag into managed care over time. The daily reminder cron surfaces due ones. Not medical advice.

topic.description: what to follow up on, e.g. 'recheck LDL'

reason.description: why it was proposed, e.g. 'LDL 190 mg/dL was high'

done.description: whether the user marked it complete

labResultId.description: the lab result that prompted this follow-up, if any

lab.description: the lab result that prompted this follow-up
